summary: Comprehensive testing of decimal input bug fix completed successfully. All number inputs in TickerCard.tsx (Buy Price, Sell Price, Stop Offset, Buy Power) and SettingsTab.tsx (Increment Step, Decrement Step) now correctly accept decimal points using the useDecimalInput hook with local string state. The fix works by allowing free text editing via regex validation and only parsing float on blur.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket connection fails but app functions via HTTP fallback
React warning about duplicate keys in AnimatePresence (existing issue)

passed_tests: TEST 1: Buy Price ($) input - typed '250.50' successfully, decimal point accepted, value persisted after blur as '250.5'
TEST 2: Sell Price ($) input - typed '275.99' successfully, decimal accepted, persisted correctly
TEST 3: Stop Offset (%) input - typed '5.75' successfully, decimal accepted with minus prefix preserved
TEST 4: Buy Power ($) input - typed '150.75' successfully, decimal accepted and persisted
TEST 5: Stepper +/- buttons - increment (250.5→250.75) and decrement working correctly
TEST 6: Settings > Increment Step - typed '0.05' successfully, decimal accepted
TEST 7: Settings > Decrement Step - typed '0.10' successfully, decimal accepted
Ticker cards display live prices (AAPL: ~$250, NVDA: ~$180, QBTS: ~$17.5)
LIVE ACTIVITY sidebar shows real-time trades
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing ticker data (AAPL, NVDA, QBTS, TSLA)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Decimal input fix verified working. The useDecimalInput hook in TickerCard.tsx (line 344) uses local string state with regex /^-?\d*\.?\d*$/ to allow free text editing. Float is only parsed on blur. All inputs use type='text' with inputMode='decimal'. Settings tab step inputs also fixed using same pattern.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Users could not type decimal points (.) in number input fields
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Premature parseFloat() calls were stripping trailing decimals
bug_fix_verification.fix_implemented: useDecimalInput hook with local string state, regex validation, parse on blur
components_fixed: TickerCard.tsx - SteppedInput (Buy Power, Avg Period, Trail %)
